model: CIVIC TYPE R FK8 LIMITED EDITION
prestazioni: K20C1 2.0L VTEC Turbo engine: Full PRL Motorsports Stage 3 turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 56mm billet compressor wheel) with PRL’s billet aluminum turbo manifold, 1000cc ID1000 fuel injectors, and a PRL Motorsports high-flow fuel pump to support 500+ WHP on E85

Full K-Tuned Motorsport engine management system: K-Tuned K-Pro V4 standalone ECU with custom dyno-tuned map optimized for the FK8’s direct injection and port injection hybrid system, paired with a K-Tuned flex fuel sensor and ethanol content analyzer for real-time E85 blending adjustments

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension kit (FK8-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates, spherical bearing rear upper control arms (SPL Parts), and a Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) to eliminate chassis flex under high-G cornering
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (FK8-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear wing (all pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber, 2x2 twill weave)

Volk Racing TE37SL wheels in 18x9.5 +35 front and 18x10.5 +40 rear (Gunmetal finish, 5x114.3 PCD, 56mm center bore) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) for maximum mechanical grip

Seibon Carbon FK8-specific carbon fiber hood (dry carbon, 50% weight reduction) with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, paired with a custom titanium bolt kit (ARP 625+) and a full carbon fiber front splitter (Varis Japan) with adjustable dive planes
